name: stub-auth
description: Stub AI provider driver for core-auth — canned responses to validate the auth pipeline; the reference example for building provider plugins.
author: intisy

scripts.build: npm --prefix core-ir install && npm --prefix core-ir run build && node core/teavm-build.mjs --java-dir java --module :stub-teavm --out src/generated/stub-provider.teavm.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); import('./src/generated/stub-provider.teavm.js').then(m=>fs.writeFileSync('src/generated/stub-models.json', m.buildModelsJson(3)))" && npx tsc --project core-auth/tsconfig.json && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:sync-bridge --outfile=dist/index.js && npx esbuild src/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:sync-bridge --outfile=dist/handler.js && npx esbuild src/javaProvider.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/javaProvider.js && npx esbuild src/driver.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:sync-bridge --outfile=dist/driver.js
